4f6b98d0ad77e2abfd6ea14e481f12789b4b92df: {"name": "Sales & Staffing Overview", "widgets": [{"question": "How much are we selling by region?", "sql": "SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_amount DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Sales by Region", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "What is total sales revenue?", "sql": "SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1", "chart_type": "stat", "title": "Total Sales", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "How is sales split by product?", "sql": "SELECT product, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_amount DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Sales by Product", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "How many staff are in each department?", "sql": "SELECT dept, COUNT(*) AS headcount FROM \"staff.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY dept ORDER BY headcount DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Headcount by Department", "source": "staff.csv"}], "filters": [{"column": "region", "label": "Region"}, {"column": "product", "label": "Product"}, {"column": "dept", "label": "Department"}]}
b6c8b76e1f5c21b07e8e3d3a7dd763ad984a0346: {"clarification": {"question": "What should this dashboard focus on?", "options": ["Sales performance (sales.csv)", "Staffing overview (staff.csv)", "Both sales and staffing"]}}
59cce612ef0a4fafd2ecc2a0dd494cdda2e4f0ed: {"name": "Sales & Staffing Overview", "widgets": [{"question": "How much are we selling by region?", "sql": "SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_amount DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Sales by Region", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "What is total sales revenue?", "sql": "SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1", "chart_type": "stat", "title": "Total Sales", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "How many sales records are there per region?", "sql": "SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM \"sales.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY region ORDER BY row_count DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Records by Region", "source": "sales.csv"}, {"question": "How many staff are in each department?", "sql": "SELECT dept, COUNT(*) AS headcount FROM \"staff.csv\" WHERE /*FILTERS*/ 1=1 GROUP BY dept ORDER BY headcount DESC", "chart_type": "bar", "title": "Headcount by Department", "source": "staff.csv"}], "filters": [{"column": "region", "label": "Region"}, {"column": "product", "label": "Product"}, {"column": "dept", "label": "Department"}]}
